sourceAmbiguity: Claim and resume could redirect away and return later even when same-lineage continuity remains valid.
decisionTaken: Render all claim, resume, stale-link, hold, and support states inside `/portal/claim/*` with a preserved PatientRequestReturnBundle.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Same shell and same lineage are preserved whenever the continuity key remains recoverable.
operationalRisk: Future external auth returns may introduce new route aliases.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Map new aliases into ClaimResumePostureResolver and keep the same-shell posture family.
